message:
fix: show Next button when Cloud IAM auth is selected in Add Cluster (#8928)

The ConnectTab step 2 previously gated the Next button behind
`authType !== 'cloud-iam'`, so selecting Cloud IAM left the user with
no way to advance to step 3 (context settings). Cloud IAM flows don't
require any token/cert input in the UI — authentication happens via
the vendor CLI — so the button should always be enabled for cloud-iam.

Render the Next button for all auth types and fold the cloud-iam case
into the disabled predicate (always enabled). Adds a regression test.

Fixes #8914

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
